title: Salesforce Marketing Cloud Contact
description: Schema representing a contact in Salesforce Marketing Cloud. A contact is an individual who interacts with marketing campaigns across email, SMS, push, and other channels. Contacts are the central entity in Marketing Cloud's data model, identified by a unique contactKey that persists across all channels and applications.

contactKey.description: Unique identifier for the contact across all Marketing Cloud channels and applications. This value is the primary key used for contact lookup, journey entry, and cross-channel identification.

contactID.description: System-generated unique numeric identifier assigned by Marketing Cloud upon contact creation. This value is read-only and cannot be modified.

contactStatus.description: Current lifecycle status of the contact within Marketing Cloud.

createdDate.description: ISO 8601 date and time when the contact was created in Marketing Cloud.

modifiedDate.description: ISO 8601 date and time when the contact was last modified.

emailAddresses.description: Email addresses associated with the contact. Corresponds to the Email Addresses attribute set in Marketing Cloud.

mobileNumbers.description: Mobile phone numbers associated with the contact for SMS/MMS messaging. Corresponds to the MobileConnect Demographics attribute set.

pushRegistrations.description: Push notification device registrations for the contact. Corresponds to the MobilePush Demographics attribute set.

demographics.description: Demographic and profile information for the contact.

attributeSets.description: Custom and system attribute sets associated with the contact. Each attribute set contains a named group of attribute values.

emailAddress.title: Email Address
emailAddress.description: An email address associated with the contact, including delivery and engagement metadata.

htmlEnabled.description: Whether the contact prefers HTML-formatted emails. When false, plain text is preferred.

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary email address for the contact.

status.description: Current status of the email address.

mobileNumber.title: Mobile Number
mobileNumber.description: A mobile phone number associated with the contact for MobileConnect (SMS/MMS) messaging.
The mobile phone number in E.164 format.

locale.description: Locale code for the mobile number, used for message localization.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the mobile number.

isOptedIn.description: Whether the contact has opted in to receive SMS/MMS messages at this number.

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary mobile number for the contact.

pushRegistration.title: Push Registration
pushRegistration.description: A mobile push notification registration for the contact's device.

deviceId.description: Unique identifier for the registered device.

platform.description: Mobile platform of the registered device.

deviceToken.description: Platform-specific push notification token for the device.

isActive.description: Whether push notifications are active for this device.

applicationName.description: Name of the mobile application associated with this registration.

demographics.title: Demographics
demographics.description: Demographic and profile information for the contact.

dateOfBirth.description: Contact's date of birth in ISO 8601 format.

locale.description: Preferred locale for the contact, used for content localization.

timezone.description: Contact's timezone, used for send time optimization.

postalAddress.title: Postal Address
postalAddress.description: Physical mailing address for the contact.

country.description: Country name or ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

preferences.title: Contact Preferences
preferences.description: Communication preferences and subscription settings for the contact.

emailOptIn.description: Whether the contact has opted in to receive marketing emails.

smsOptIn.description: Whether the contact has opted in to receive SMS messages.

pushOptIn.description: Whether the contact has opted in to receive push notifications.

unsubscribeDate.description: Date and time the contact unsubscribed, if applicable.

attributeSet.title: Attribute Set
attributeSet.description: A named collection of attributes representing a category of contact data. Maps to Marketing Cloud attribute sets which define the structure for both system and custom data.

name.description: Name of the attribute set (e.g., 'Email Addresses', 'MobileConnect Demographics').

items.description: Collection of attribute value groups within this set.

values.description: Array of name-value pairs for this attribute group.

attributeValue.title: Attribute Value
attributeValue.description: A single attribute name-value pair within an attribute set.

value.description: Value of the attribute. Type varies based on the attribute definition.
